comment: Version-controlled query set for the committed synthetic benchmark vault (packages/harness/fixtures/vault — public-domain 1911 Encyclopaedia Britannica, generated with seed 42). Term frequencies below are measured against that vault, so results are reproducible by anyone. Re-running with the same set is what makes results comparable across snapshots and adapters. If you regenerate the vault with a different seed/count, re-measure these.

queries.notes: High-frequency single term — matches ~2,226 notes in the fixture vault.
Known phrase present across ~353 notes (geography entries).
Low-frequency term — matches ~9 notes; stresses cold-cache and near-zero payload paths.

reads._hint: Paths are stable for the committed seed-42 vault: small ≈ 2 KB (median note), large ≈ 800 KB. Regenerate the vault → re-pick from vault-stats.json.

_runsHint: N≥20 per the build brief. Increase for noisier numbers; decrease only when iterating.
